page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m2s.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance belonging to the ecs.sgn7i-vws family. It features an Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 4 dedicated physical cores and 4 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 2.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB per core, and includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU allocation of approximately 0.0833 of a physical GPU, yielding 2 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not included, and baseline network bandwidth is rated at 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1884.98 and a PassMark CPU score of 8818.51. However, multi-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by a stress-ng multi-core score of 5733.3 and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 21.75 GB/sec. Memory performance is mixed; while cached read-only memory bandwidth is average at 421.08 GB/sec, the overall PassMark memory score is poor at 1096.88.

For specialized workloads, the instance achieves average results in Redis SET operations at 8.53 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 10.01 GB/sec. Large language model inference on a small 135M model is moderate, reaching 117.31 tokens per second for text generation, but drops to a poor 4.57 tokens per second on a medium 7B model. Given the fractional GPU and low memory-to-vCPU ratio, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for lightweight GPU-accelerated tasks, entry-level virtual workstations, and basic model inference, rather than memory-intensive database operations or heavy multi-threaded compute workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m2s.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.9 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of system memory. It includes a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 2 GB of VRAM, but lacks local storage, relying on a 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows average single-core CPU performance and Redis throughput, though multi-core CPU and memory scores are weak. The hardware supports advanced vector and cryptography extensions, including AVX-512 and AES, which assist in accelerating specific computational tasks despite the constrained memory footprint. The instance is suitable for lightweight GPU-accelerated workloads, entry-level virtual workstations, and small-scale model inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m2s.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 2 GB of VRAM for entry-level graphics workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sgn7i-vws-m2s.xlarge features 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 2 GB VRAM.
tagline: A budget-friendly, GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing and fractional graphics resources for lightweight visual computing workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8369B processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs at 2.9 GHz
Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU providing 2 GB of dedicated VRAM
8.0 GB of system memory and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
No local storage included with the instance configuration
Best suited for lightweight GPU workloads and virtual workstations
